attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DISTINCT *
FROM (SELECT d.segment1 company_code, b.country
      FROM apps.gl_ledger_le_v a,
           apps.gl_ledgers c,
           apps.gl_code_combinations d,
           apps.hr_locations b
      WHERE     1 = 1
            AND a.ledger_id = c.ledger_id
            AND c.ret_earn_code_combination_id = d.code_combination_id
            AND a.location_id = b.location_id)
